title: Flaming(火焰熊熊)
description: This mod makes some wood products and similar wood products that cannot be used as fuel in the original version become fuel again, and adds fuel expansion.
body:
In the process of adventure, you will often come across some "small masterpieces" left by Mojang, intentionally or unintentionally. Mojang has brought us too many surprises.

For example, beds are made of log/wood:
They are either not stackable or cannot be handled correctly, or they take up a lot of space.

Now, this module can help you solve this problem efficiently and without waste!


This mod makes some wood products and similar wood products that cannot be used as fuel in the original version become fuel again, and adds fuel expansion.

Note: Farbic Launcher and Farbic API need to be installed (forge/fabric directory: mods)

FAQ

Q1: Will it be updated to a new version of the game?
A1: Yes, this mod is easy to update.

Q2: What fuels have been added?
A2: It can be viewed in the log.

Q3: What if there is a bug/crash/no effect after adding the mod?
A3: Please confirm if your operating mode (forge or fabric) is correct first. If it is confirmed to be correct and still cannot be resolved, please contact 1371543805@qq.com Ask.
